product_definition.title: Sound & Noise System
product_definition.description: A gameplay-relevant noise emission and hearing system for UE5.5. Actors emit noise events that propagate through the AI Perception system, attenuated by distance and material occlusion. Used for stealth, AI awareness, and sound-based puzzles.
product_definition.target_audience: Stealth, horror, and immersive sim game developers

core_features: UNoiseEmitterComponent: emits tagged noise events with loudness and range
UNoiseHearingComponent: receives filtered noise events, raises OnNoiseHeard delegate
Noise tags: Footstep, Gunshot, Explosion, Voice, Object, Ambient
Material occlusion: raycast checks wall materials, attenuates by occlusion factor
AI Perception bridge: reports hearing stimuli to UAIPerceptionSystem
Surface material DataAsset: footstep sound sets per physical material
Noise visualization debug draw: spheres with loudness radius
Footstep automation: tag-driven footstep emission on character movement

demo_map_requirements.test_scenario: Player walks on metal surface near AI, footstep noise triggers AI awareness
